Vanguard.description: Blanks who rely purely on physical conditioning. Represents 0% purity warriors.
Vanguard.solo_mode: Gains an NPC companion (Fighter or Cleric sidekick) at session start.

level_3.Aether Resilience: Advantage on saving throws against spells cast within 15 feet of you.
level_3.Grit Over Flow: When failing an attack/Athletics due to modifier penalty, take 1d4 bludgeoning to reroll the d20.

Strider-Garrison.description: Scouts, assassins, core-thieves who harvest Aether-Cores from slain monsters.
Strider-Garrison.solo_mode: Gains an NPC companion (Ranger or Druid sidekick) at session start.

level_3.Surgical Extraction: Proficiency with Alchemist's Supplies. Add prof bonus to DEX check when harvesting Aether-Cores.
level_3.Core Injection: Bonus action — crush Fractured core onto weapon. Next Sneak Attack deals +1d6 elemental damage.

Archon Caster.description: Noble magic users. Access to full arcane magic. Spell Safety DC applies.
Archon Caster.solo_mode: Gains an NPC companion (Fighter bodyguard) at session start.

level_2.Blood Focus: Use your own blood as an arcane focus. Reduces Spell Safety DC by 2 but costs 1 HP per spell level cast.

Ordained.description: Church-sanctioned divine casters. Draconic Retribution at level 2.
Ordained.solo_mode: Gains an NPC companion (Paladin or Cleric sidekick) at session start.

level_2.Draconic Retribution: Add 1d4 elemental damage to melee weapon attacks.

Penitent.description: Pact magic users. The Fervor Risk available. Illegal in most regions. Cult of the Sixth operatives.
Penitent.solo_mode: Gains an NPC companion (Cultist or Rogue sidekick) at session start.
Penitent.group_mode: Standard party member. Cult membership is SECRET from other players.

level_1.The Fervor Risk: Bonus action — gain advantage on melee attacks for 1 minute, but take 1d4 necrotic at start of each turn. End as bonus action.

Sovereign.description: SECRET CLASS — not available at character creation. Revealed at level 20 to the Nyx vessel.

solo_mode.description: A single player campaigns alone with NPC companions.
solo_mode.channel_creation: Bot creates a private channel under DND_CATEGORY_ID named 'solo-{username}'.
solo_mode.npc_party: 3 NPC companions auto-generated at session start.
solo_mode.channel_deletion: Channel deleted when session ends or campaign completes.

group_mode.description: Multiple players in a shared session channel.
group_mode.npc_party: No NPC companions unless party is under 3 players.

cross_party.description: Solo players can interact with group players.
cross_party.mechanics: NPC companion acts as messenger. Bot relays between channels. Shared quests possible.

campaign_completion.chronicle: Bot generates a campaign chronicle saved to dm_game_state.episode_log.
campaign_completion.channel_cleanup: Solo channels deleted. Group channel kept.
campaign_completion.character_sheets: Sheets archived in Supabase. Players can reference past campaigns.
